---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Motivation

Why is this needed? What user or project problem does it solve?

## Proposal

What should be built? Describe the expected behavior or interface.

## Suggested Module

- [ ] Frontend
- [ ] Backend
- [ ] RSS parsing
- [ ] Sync / scheduling
- [ ] Notes
- [ ] Search
- [ ] Export
- [ ] AI summary
- [ ] AI translation
- [ ] Documentation / tooling

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider?

## Out of Scope

What should not be included in this feature?
